tool_args.label: Long Island Rail Road

payload.description: Report presents preliminary 2025 results compared to the November Forecast, subject to change pending final year-end adjustments and audit review.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Long Island Rail Road
Financial and Ridership Reports – December 2025

tool_args.label: Michael Reilly, Financial Liaison

evidence_refs.source_quote: Michael Reilly, Financial Liaison

tool_args.label: LIRR Year-to-Date Ridership through December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: ridership was 81.9 million which was 8.9% above 2024 and 0.1% above the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Total Revenue YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total revenue of $1,205.9 million was $25.8 million favorable to the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Farebox Revenue YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: farebox revenue of $695.7 million was $0.4 million higher than the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Total Expenses Before Non-Cash Liabilities YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total expenses before non-cash liability adjustments of $2,437.7 million were $20.4 million or 0.8% favorable to the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Total Headcount December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Total headcount was 7,808, which was 208 positions lower than the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Commutation Ridership YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commutation ridership of 30.9 million was 10.7% above 2024 and 2.1% below the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Non-Commutation Ridership YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Non-Commutation ridership of 51.0 million was 7.9% above 2024 and 1.5% above the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date December Adjusted Farebox Operating Ratio was 38.9%, which was above the forecast due to higher farebox revenue and lower expenses

tool_args.label: LIRR Adjusted Cost per Passenger YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date December Adjusted Cost per Passenger was $23.83, which was lower than the forecast due to higher ridership and lower expenses

tool_args.label: LIRR Revenue per Passenger YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: The year-to-date December Revenue per Passenger was $8.49, which was equal to forecast due to a lower yield per passenger

tool_args.label: LIRR Farebox Revenue December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: LIRR revenue totaled $59.8 million in December 2025, $1.2 million or 2.1% higher than the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Commutation Revenue YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commutation revenue of $218.8 million was $5.4 million or 2.4% lower than the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Non-Commutation Revenue YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Non-commutation revenue of $476.9 million was $5.8 million or 1.2% higher than forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Total Ridership December 2025
LIRR Commutation Revenue December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Commutation revenue of $17.9 million was $1.2 million or 6.0% lower than the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Non-Commutation Revenue December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Non-commutation revenue of $41.9 million was $2.4 million or 6.1% higher than the forecast

tool_args.label: LIRR Maintenance of Equipment Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Maintenance of Equipment Overtime of $73.5M is 43% of 2025 YTD Actuals

tool_args.label: LIRR Maintenance of Way Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: MOW of $31.3M is 18% of 2025 YTD Actuals

tool_args.label: LIRR Transportation Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transportation Overtime of $57.8 M is 34% of 2025 YTD Actuals

tool_args.label: LIRR Stations Non-Reimbursable Overtime YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Stations Overtime of $6.0M is 4% of 2025 YTD Actuals

tool_args.label: LIRR Non-Reimbursable Overtime Variance vs Final Estimate

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overspend of $0.7M vs Final Estimate primarily due to unfavorable Weather-Related Overtime and Unscheduled Maintenance

tool_args.label: LIRR Reimbursable Overtime Variance vs Final Estimate YTD December 2025

evidence_refs.source_quote: Overspend of $4.5M vs Final Estimate driven by various capital projects and Transportation flagging needs
